visuals.title: Disk Scheduling Algorithms - Head Movement Comparison
visuals.description: Visual comparison of how different disk scheduling algorithms move the disk head across cylinders to service I/O requests

diagrams.title: FCFS vs SSTF vs SCAN Head Movement
steps: SCAN: Move left then right 53→37→14→0→65→67→98→122→124→183 (236 cylinders)
Compare total head movements to select best algorithm
diagrams.notes: SSTF and LOOK typically give the least head movement but SSTF can cause starvation. C-SCAN gives most uniform wait times.
